request_text: Tidy-first governed op: rename SurfaceKind to ToolSurfaceKind in src/specify_cli/tool_surface/enums.py and all 258 usage sites across 12+ modules, to remove conflation with the mission-topology Surface enum in src/mission_runtime/artifacts.py (which is separately being renamed to TopologySurface). Enum VALUES (command_skill, doctrine_skill, etc) are unchanged - type name only, no wire-shape change. Requires an ADR recording the two-surface-vocabulary distinction and a glossary update in docs/context/ covering the overloaded term 'surface'. Not a full mission; prudence plus squad review.
